title: stelis gelida
intro: Stelis gelida, also known as the gelid stelis, is a type of flowering orchid plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, making it a potential natural remedy for skin and wound infections. The health benefits of stelis gelida include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and heal various health issues. The herbal preparations of stelis gelida typically involve drying the plant's leaves and roots to create infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to promote healing and prevent infection.
